name: Visionstate Corp.
summary: Visionstate Corp., through its subsidiary, Visionstate Inc., operates as a software development company in North America. It specializes in applications for the Internet of Things (IoT) and analytics. Its principal product is Washroom Notification and Digital Aid (WANDA), a touch-screen solution that collects information on cleaning activities, monitors supply inventories, optimizes workforces, enhances employee accountability, and provides detailed analytics. The company also offers interactive electronic business solutions in the form of touchscreen and mobile way finding and applications, as well as consulting, graphic, and web design and related services and support. The company installs its products in locations, including hospitals, airports, shopping centers, office buildings, and other public facilities. Visionstate Corp. is headquartered in Edmonton, Canada.
